title: Settings
templatesNoActiveFile: No active file. Open a file to mark it as a template.
templatesUnsupportedActiveFile: Only .atex or .md files can be marked as templates.
shortcutsDesc: Capture and customize keyboard shortcuts per command
shortcutsCaptureHint: Click Set/Change, then press a key combination. Press Esc to cancel capture.
commandsPinnedHint: Pinned commands are prioritized before MRU in command palettes

template_insert_open_picker.label: Insert Template
template_insert_open_picker.description: Pick a template and insert it into the active file

template_new_from_open_picker.label: New File From Template
template_new_from_open_picker.description: Pick a template and create a new file from it

template_toggle_active_file.label: Toggle Active File As Template
template_toggle_active_file.description: Mark or unmark the active file as a reusable template

workspace_mode_enjoy_toggle.label: Toggle Enjoy Mode
workspace_mode_enjoy_toggle.description: Toggle workspace between editor and enjoy

workspace_mode_git.label: Switch To Source Control
workspace_mode_git.description: Switch workspace mode to git source control

settings_playback_progress_bar_toggle.label: Toggle Playback Progress Bar
settings_playback_progress_bar_toggle.description: Show or hide playback progress bar

settings_playback_sync_scroll_toggle.label: Toggle Sync Scroll
settings_playback_sync_scroll_toggle.description: Enable or disable editor sync scroll

settings_playback_cursor_broadcast_toggl.label: Toggle Cursor Broadcast
settings_playback_cursor_broadcast_toggl.description: Enable or disable editor cursor broadcast

settings_playback_component_staff_contro.label: Toggle Staff Controls
settings_playback_component_staff_contro.description: Show or hide staff controls component

settings_playback_component_tracks_contr.label: Toggle Tracks Controls
settings_playback_component_tracks_contr.description: Show or hide tracks controls component

settings_playback_component_zoom_control.label: Toggle Zoom Controls
settings_playback_component_zoom_control.description: Show or hide zoom controls component

settings_playback_component_speed_contro.label: Toggle Speed Controls
settings_playback_component_speed_contro.description: Show or hide playback speed controls component

settings_playback_component_progress_con.label: Toggle Progress Controls
settings_playback_component_progress_con.description: Show or hide playback progress controls component

settings_playback_component_transport_co.label: Toggle Transport Controls
settings_playback_component_transport_co.description: Show or hide playback transport controls component

labDesc: Experimental OMR testing entry for images to alphaTex

labPage.desktopOnly: Lab features are only available in the desktop app. Download Tabst desktop to try OMR.
labPage.runtimeReadyHint: Model and local inference service are ready for OMR.
labPage.modelRequiredHint: Download the local OMR model before recognition. This lab only validates the end-to-end flow.
labPage.dropHint: Supports PNG, JPG, JPEG, and WEBP up to 10 MB. Images are resized to 448px for the model.
labPage.longStartupHint: Still waiting for llama-server health checks. First launch can take a little longer.
labPage.longRecognitionHint: Recognition is taking longer than usual. You can keep waiting or cancel and retry with a cleaner crop.

stageHint.idle: Choose or paste a tab image to start the local OMR flow.
stageHint.image-ready: Image is resized and ready. Start recognition when the model is available.
stageHint.checking-model: Checking whether the local model cache is complete and verified.
stageHint.downloading-model: Downloading and verifying the local vision model before recognition.
stageHint.checking-sidecar: Checking the local llama.cpp inference service before submitting the image.
stageHint.starting-sidecar: Starting the local inference service and waiting for its health check.
stageHint.submitting-job: Sending the prepared image to the local inference service.
stageHint.recognizing: The local model is reading the image and generating alphaTex.
stageHint.validating: Checking the generated text with alphaTab's alphaTex parser.
stageHint.completed: Recognition finished. Review the result before inserting it into the editor.
stageHint.failed: The flow stopped with an error. Use the recovery actions below.
stageHint.cancelled: Recognition was cancelled. You can retry when ready.

labPage.recoveryHint: Try the suggested action below, or re-check the runtime status after fixing the issue.
labPage.invalidAlphaTex: Recognition result contains {{count}} alphaTex syntax issue(s).
labPage.invalidInsertConfirm: The recognition result has alphaTex syntax issues. Insert it anyway?

labErrors.model-not-found: Model not downloaded. Download the model first.
labErrors.sidecar-stopped: Inference service is stopped. It will start automatically when recognition begins.
labErrors.model-download-failed: Model download failed. Check the network or import the model manually.
labErrors.model-checksum-mismatch: Model checksum failed. Delete and download again.
labErrors.sidecar-crashed: Inference service exited unexpectedly. Restart it and try again.
labErrors.sidecar-busy: A recognition job is already running. Wait or cancel it.
labErrors.omr-timeout: Recognition timed out. Try again or cancel.
labErrors.clipboard-no-image: Clipboard does not contain an image.
labErrors.image-too-large: Image is too large. Compress it and try again.
labErrors.desktop-only: Lab is only available in the desktop app.
labErrors.insufficient-disk-space: Insufficient disk space for the model.

aboutTagline1: Tabst. Write guitar tabs like markdown.
aboutTagline2: Efficiently write alphaTex, play scores, and share PDF/GP.
alphatabCaptionLine1: Tabst is inspired and powered by alphaTab.js

appearanceSection.title: Appearance
appearanceSection.themeHint: Theme is controlled by page class
appearanceSection.resourceAssetsHint: Choose built-in playback resources. Soundfont files and licenses are stored under public/assets/soundfonts/*.
appearanceSection.followSystemDescription: Automatically switch between light and dark themes based on system settings

playbackSection.keepAwakeDuringPlaybackHint: Prevent display sleep while practicing playback (currently available on macOS)
playbackSection.playbackProgressBarHint: Show playback timeline and current progress in the bottom toolbar
playbackSection.playbackProgressSeekHint: Allow dragging the progress bar to jump playback position
playbackSection.syncScrollHint: Auto-scroll editor to follow current note during playback
playbackSection.cursorBroadcastHint: Sync editor cursor bar position to Preview display
playbackSection.customPlayerHint: Configure which player controls to show and their order
playbackSection.customAssetsHint: Use custom runtime resource urls. Relative paths resolve from app root in dev and from bundled dist in desktop build.

playerConfigurator.dragToReorder: Press enter or space to toggle, drag to reorder {{component}}
playerConfigurator.hint: Drag to reorder • Toggle checkbox to show/hide controls
playerConfigurator.playbackProgressDesc: Show current progress and support draggable seek
playerConfigurator.playbackTransportDesc: Play, pause, stop, and refresh buttons
